register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Click the button to generate an access code
register.description: Clicking the button will generate a unique 12-digit access code for system login.
register.success: Your access code has been created! Save it in a safe place.
register.accessCodeHelp: Use this code to log in to the system
register.warning: ⚠️ Save this code in a safe place! It will not be shown again and is required to log in.
register.couponCodeHelp: Provide a registration coupon code to create an account
register.invitationCodeHelp: If you have an invitation code, enter it to receive a bonus

errors.accessCodeRequired: Access code is required to continue
errors.couponNotForRegistration: This coupon is not for registration
